title: Botrys ambrosioides
intro: Botrys ambrosioides, also known as Sweet Annie or Chinese Chrysanthemum, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The health benefits of Botrys ambrosioides include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and colds, as well as skin conditions like eczema. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Botrys ambrosioides is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to relieve coughs, soothe skin irritations, and promote relaxation.
